texto: The playwright's rendition of Abraham Lincoln remembers a pitiful little paddlewheel he saw that he could only generate steam to EITHER blow the ship's whistle OR move the wheel. Just as the little ship could not do both, Lincoln fears that very few can actually think and speak at the same time.
explicacao: Citação de Norman Corwin sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The playwright's rendition of Abraham Lincoln remembers a pitiful little paddlewheel he saw that …” articula reflexao, speech, thought em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e thought.

frase_original: The playwright's rendition of Abraham Lincoln remembers a pitiful little paddlewheel he saw that he could only generate steam to EITHER blow the ship's whistle OR move the wheel.
